paper_title: Analysis of S-RNase and SFB Alleles

methods.description: This method involves amplifying the full-length sequences of S-RNase alleles from P. pseudocerasus and analyzing their sequence polymorphism and conserved regions to determine their classification as Prunus S-RNase alleles.

steps.description: The full-length sequence of six S-RNase alleles have been successfully amplified in this study.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify full-length sequences of S-RNase alleles
inputs: partial coding sequences of S-RNase alleles

steps.description: The deduced amino acid sequences showed high sequence identities (70.5 to 79.4%) between these alleles, indicating high polymorphism in the six S-allelic sequences.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sequence identities and polymorphism of S-RNase alleles
inputs: amino acid sequences of S-RNase alleles

steps.description: The presence of five conserved regions (C1, C2, C3, RC4 and C5) and one hypervariable region (RHV) in these alleles indicated that these six S-alleles belong to the Prunus S-RNase alleles.
steps.searchable_summary: identify conserved and hypervariable regions in S-RNase alleles

methods.description: This method involves identifying SFB alleles with specific motifs and regions, analyzing their expression and polymorphism, and determining their linkage and cosegregation with S-RNase alleles to classify them as Prunus SFB alleles.

steps.description: Only four P. pseudocerasus SFB alleles with an F-box motif, two variable regions and two hypervariable regions were identified in this study.
steps.searchable_summary: identify SFB alleles with F-box motif and variable regions

steps.description: These SFBs were tightly linked to their S-RNases, specifically expressed in pollen grains with high polymorphism (76.9 to 80.0%).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze linkage, expression, and polymorphism of SFB alleles

steps.description: Cosegregated along with their cognate S-RNases, indicating that the four SFB alleles belonged to the Prunus SFB alleles.
steps.searchable_summary: determine cosegregation of SFB alleles with S-RNase alleles
